user.title: Connect to SAM
user.description: Configure the connection to your Solace Agent Mesh instance. The SAM Web UI URL is only needed if you want to use SAM as your TTS/STT provider.

data.sam_url: SAM Web UI URL (optional, for TTS/STT — e.g. http://localhost:8000)

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect — check that HA's MQTT integration is configured and the namespace is correct.
